page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package contains the function to assess the batch sourcs by fitting all "sources" as random effects including two-way interaction terms in the Mixed Model(depends on lme4 package) to selected principal components, which were obtained from the original data correlation matrix.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package contains the function to assess the batch sourcs by fitting all "sources" as random effects including two-way interaction terms in the Mixed Model(depends on lme4 package) to selected principal components, which were obtained from the original data correlation matrix.
